calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-07-2017 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-29-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Patrick McNeil for and with Michael O'Brien.
Giulio Accornero for American Research Bureau.

Mr. McNeil stated that Mr. O'Brien is profoundly sorry and taking the step of waiving statutory fees with the agreement of Mr. Accornero that those fees will go directly to the two Nieces. Mr. Accornero stated that time records are not available on contingnecy fees, that he did not know American Research was required to provide time records, that he can not present anything further and that he does not know what went on. The First and Final Account and Report, etc. is taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
